title: B. Nether Wart
description: This texture pack improves the original look of the nether wart with a new color palette to make harvesting this block easier.
body:
This texture pack improves the original look of the Nether Wart with a new color palette to make harvesting this block easier.

The texture helps you know when it's ready to be harvested.

The original template is used with a new color palette.
*The design may be improved in future versions.
